name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: These premium UV protection sunglasses are designed to keep your eyes safe from harmful sun rays during the intense summer heat. Crafted with high-quality lenses and a lightweight durable frame, they provide long-lasting comfort and a stylish look. Perfect for beach days, travel, and everyday outdoor use.

name: Summer Cotton T-Shirt
description: Stay cool with this breathable cotton t-shirt made for summer comfort. Soft fabric, relaxed fit, and minimal design make it perfect for daily wear, travel, and casual outings.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Protect your skin with this SPF 50 sunscreen that blocks harmful UVA and UVB rays. Lightweight, non-greasy, and perfect for daily summer protection.

name: Beach Straw Hat
description: Stylish and breathable straw hat that protects your face from sunlight. Ideal for beach trips, travel, and outdoor events.

name: Flip Flop Sandals
description: Lightweight and comfortable flip flop sandals designed for summer. Anti-slip sole ensures safety and all-day comfort.

name: Hydration Water Bottle
description: Reusable BPA-free water bottle designed to keep you hydrated throughout hot summer days. Leak-proof and travel friendly.

name: Beach Travel Bag
description: Spacious and stylish beach bag with water-resistant material. Perfect for carrying all your summer essentials.

name: Cooling Face Mist
description: Instantly refresh your skin with this cooling face mist. Keeps your skin hydrated and glowing during hot summer days.

name: Men's Summer Shorts
description: Comfortable and stylish summer shorts made with breathable fabric. Perfect for outdoor activities and casual wear.

name: Portable Mini Fan
description: Compact and powerful portable mini fan to keep you cool anywhere. Long battery life and quiet performance.
